sessions.intent: Design action-based conditions for condition.if module

before.assumptions: Current condition.if has single bool Condition parameter.
before.risk: Changing .pr format for conditions affects all existing condition tests.

sessions.plan: Redesign condition.if with Left/Operator/Right parameters. Add condition.compare. Add sub-step execution. Add pluggable IEvaluator.

actions.context: Full architectural design after three rounds of steering.

after.health: Plan approved by Ingi after 3 steering rounds
after.notes: Key decisions: sub-steps are runtime not builder tricks, providers live in the module.

sessions.intent: Design test suites for action-based conditions

actions.context: 69 C# test stubs + 21 PLang pipeline test suites

sessions.intent: Implement action-based conditions: IEvaluator, DefaultEvaluator, condition.if refactor, condition.compare, sub-step skip logic

before.assumptions: Architect design approved. 69 C# test stubs exist. Current condition.if has single bool Condition param. Steps.RunAsync has no sub-step logic. Libraries doesn't have GetProvider<T> yet.
before.risk: Source generator must handle new partial property types. Sub-step skip logic must be thread-safe. Data.Merge may lose bool values.

sessions.plan: 1. Create providers/IEvaluator.cs. 2. Create providers/DefaultEvaluator.cs. 3. Modify condition/if.cs: replace bool Condition with Left/Operator/Right. 4. Create condition/compare.cs. 5. Modify Steps/this.cs with sub-step logic. 6. Implement all 69 C# test stubs.

actions.context: Evaluator interface and default implementation. All operators, type normalization, IsTruthy.
Replaced bool Condition with Left/Operator/Right. Added __condition__ MemoryStack signal for sub-step control.
Pure bool evaluation action for compound AND/OR.
Sub-step execution logic. Indented steps don't execute unless proven by __condition__ signal. HasIndentedChildren helper.
Implemented 69 test stubs, updated 6 existing tests (Condition -> Left). All pass.
Added Libraries.GetProvider<T> todo for pluggable evaluators.

after.status: Complete — 69 new tests + 1580 existing all pass. Codeanalyzer fixes applied.
after.notes: Key discovery: Data.Merge loses non-list values. Solved via __condition__ MemoryStack signal. Codeanalyzer v1 fixes: sealed DefaultEvaluator, static array, Contains boxing fix, HasIndentedChildren internal, merged duplicate summary.

sessions.intent: Code analysis of coder v1 action-based conditions implementation

before.assumptions: Coder v1 complete with 69 tests passing. 5 production files to review.
before.risk: OBP violations, thread safety of __condition__ signal, evaluator hardcoding, Data contract misuse.

sessions.plan: 5-pass analysis (OBP, simplification, readability, behavioral, deletion) of IEvaluator.cs, DefaultEvaluator.cs, if.cs, compare.cs, Steps/this.cs. Focus on thread safety of __condition__ signal, Data usage, source generator compatibility, and OBP compliance.

actions.context: 5-pass analysis. Found 4 mechanical issues + 1 medium-severity behavioral bug (Contains with boxed numerics).

after.health: 4 mechanical fixes + 1 behavioral bug to address
after.notes: No OBP violations. Thread safety confirmed. Key finding: DefaultEvaluator.Contains uses reference equality for boxed numerics, causing int vs long mismatches in collection lookups.

sessions.intent: Re-review action-based conditions after coder fixes for v1 findings

before.assumptions: Coder applied all 5 v1 fixes. Need to verify each fix and check for fix-introduced issues.
before.risk: Fix-introduced code (ContainsElement) may itself have issues or lack test coverage.

sessions.plan: Verify all 5 v1 findings fixed. Run abbreviated 5-pass on changed code. Focus on fix-introduced surface (ContainsElement method). Check deletion test for new code paths.

actions.context: All 5 fixes verified. ContainsElement implementation correct. One test gap: no test for mixed numeric types in collection Contains.

after.health: Green — all fixes correct, one test gap noted
after.notes: ContainsElement NormalizeTypes path for mixed numeric collection lookups has no test. Recommend tester adds Evaluate(new List<long>{5L}, 'contains', (int)5).

sessions.intent: Validate test quality for action-based conditions, fix coverage gaps

before.assumptions: Coder v1 complete with 69 tests. Codeanalyzer v2 passed with one test gap noted (ContainsElement mixed-numeric).
before.risk: Review-driven code (ContainsElement) may lack test coverage. Other gaps may exist in the 69-test suite.

sessions.plan: 1. Run full C# test suite (1580 tests) — verify zero regressions. 2. Analyze test quality across all 5 test files. 3. Apply false-green hunting: deletion test, review-driven code check, weak assertion scan. 4. Add missing ContainsElement mixed-numeric test. 5. Check for other coverage gaps. 6. Write test-report.json and verdict.

actions.context: Analyzed all 5 test files for false greens, weak assertions, and coverage gaps.
Added 6 tests: collection contains (hit/miss), mixed-numeric contains (int-in-long-list, long-in-int-list), mixed-numeric in (both directions).
Added 2 tests verifying __condition__ signal is set in MemoryStack for true and false conditions.
Test report with 5 findings (2 major fixed, 2 minor noted, 1 deferred).

after.status: Complete — verdict APPROVED. 1588 tests pass (8 new).
after.health: Green — all major gaps fixed, zero regressions
after.notes: Two major gaps fixed: ContainsElement mixed-numeric (6 tests) and __condition__ signal (2 tests). Two minor weak-assertion findings noted. PLang pipeline tests deferred.

sessions.intent: Security review of action-based conditions implementation

before.assumptions: Coder v1 complete, codeanalyzer passed, tester approved. 5 production files to review for security.
before.risk: MemoryStack signal spoofing, evaluator injection, type confusion, DoS via crafted inputs.

sessions.plan: Phase 1 (blue team): Map attack surface for evaluator dispatch, type normalization, __condition__ signal, sub-step skip logic, collection iteration. Phase 2 (red team): Test operator injection, type confusion in Compare, __condition__ spoofing, collection DoS, NormalizeTypes recursion, strict bool check. Phase 3: Write security-report.json and verdict.

actions.context: Blue team + red team security review. 5 attack surface areas mapped, 5 findings identified.
Security report, verdict (PASS), plan, and summaries.

after.health: Green — no critical or high findings
after.notes: One medium finding: __condition__ stale signal spoofing. Three low findings. Two accepted-risk. Recommend auditor review next.

sessions.intent: Final audit of action-based conditions implementation

before.assumptions: All prior reviews passed (codeanalyzer v2, tester v1, security v1). 1588 tests passing.
before.risk: Contract violations missed by prior reviews. Exception handling gaps in handler methods.

sessions.plan: 1. Read coder summary, all verdicts. 2. Read all 5 production + 5 test files. 3. Run full test suite. 4. OBP 5-rule check. 5. Contract integrity: exception handling, Data return guarantees. 6. Test quality: exception paths, negative tests. 7. Write findings, verdict, summaries.

actions.context: Full audit: OBP compliance clean. Found 2 major contract violations (unhandled exceptions in If.Run and Compare.Run), 1 minor safety issue, 1 nit.
Audit report, verdict (FAIL), plan, and summaries.

after.health: Two major findings require coder fix
after.notes: If.Run() and Compare.Run() can throw unhandled exceptions from evaluator. Violates 'behavior methods never throw' contract. OBP compliance is clean. Send back to coder.

sessions.intent: Fix auditor FAIL findings: add try/catch to If.Run() and Compare.Run(), fix WiderNumericType fallback, fix non-IComparable Compare

before.assumptions: Auditor found 2 major contract violations (unhandled exceptions) + 1 minor + 1 nit. Security found non-IComparable silent fallback.
before.risk: Low — straightforward exception handling additions with matching tests.

sessions.plan: 1. Add try/catch to If.Run() and Compare.Run() returning Data.FromError for evaluator exceptions. 2. Fix WiderNumericType fallback from byte to decimal. 3. Throw for non-IComparable in Compare(). 4. Add 6+ tests covering all fixes. 5. Strengthen existing weak assertions.

actions.context: Added try/catch for evaluator exceptions returning ValidationError with rich diagnostics (operator, types, values, fix suggestion).
WiderNumericType fallback changed from byte to decimal. Non-IComparable Compare() now throws ArgumentException.
7 new tests: unsupported operator, non-IComparable, __condition__ negative test, strengthened weak assertions.

after.status: Complete — all 4 auditor findings + security #4 fixed. 1595 tests pass.
after.notes: Rich error messages include operator, operand types/values, and fix suggestions for LLM/user diagnosis.

sessions.intent: Re-run tests after coder v2 auditor fixes, verify all pass with zero regressions

before.assumptions: Coder v2 fixed all 4 auditor findings + security #4. 7 new tests added. Expected 1595 total.
before.risk: Low — verification run, not adding code.

sessions.plan: 1. Run full C# test suite. 2. Read all changed production and test files. 3. Apply false-green hunting on new error-path tests. 4. Verify each auditor finding has a corresponding honest test. 5. Write test-report.json and verdict.

actions.context: Reviewed all changed files and tests. Applied deletion test, review-driven code check, weak assertion scan.
Updated test report for v2. 3 minor findings, verdict approved.

after.status: Complete — verdict APPROVED. 1595 tests pass, zero regressions.
after.health: Green — all auditor fixes verified with honest tests
after.notes: Three minor findings: weak assertion in ConditionHandlerTests (carried from v1), untested FixSuggestion, deferred PLang pipeline tests. None blocking.

sessions.intent: Re-audit after coder v2 fixes for v1 FAIL findings

before.assumptions: Coder v2 fixed all 4 v1 audit findings. 1595 tests pass. Tester v2 approved.
before.risk: Low — verifying fixes, not reviewing new features.

sessions.plan: 1. Read v1 auditor-report.json and coder v2 summary. 2. Read all 3 production files. 3. Read all 3 test files. 4. Apply new code path checklist. 5. Write verdict and report.

actions.context: Verified all 4 v1 findings resolved. New code path checklist passed for all try/catch and throw additions. No new findings.
Audit report (0 findings), verdict (PASS), plan, and summaries.

after.health: Green — all v1 findings resolved with matching tests
after.notes: Ready for docs bot or merge.
